'''Malklocs''' were large creatures native to [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], where they were near the top of the food chain despite them being herbivorous herd beasts. Because they were so big, only [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] could take them down.

Malklocs bore some resemblance to other massive saurians, such as the [[Fambaa/Legends|fambaa]], [[huf dun]], and [[torton]]s. [[Bioengineering/Legends|Bioengineers]] used the [[DNA/Legends|DNA]] of Malklocs to create [[Mutant|mutated]] variants of the creature known as [[Malosaur/Legends|malosaurs]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Malkloc_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'']]
Malklocs appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
